authors: Shahira S. Fahmy Laila Abbas Aliaa K. ElShabassy a The American
raw_title: TikToking the Israel-Gaza War: A Content Analysis of Peace and War Narratives in Audiovisual News
title_en: TikToking the Israel-Gaza War: A Content Analysis of Peace and War Narratives in Audiovisual News
title_zh: TikTok上的以色列-加沙战争：视听新闻中和平与战争叙事的内容分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了TikTok上关于以色列-加沙战争的视听新闻内容，重点关注和平与战争两种叙事方式。通过内容分析，研究者探讨了短视频平台如何呈现冲突报道，以及不同叙事框架对公众理解的影响。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes audiovisual news content about the Israel-Gaza War on TikTok, focusing on peace and war narratives. Through content analysis, researchers examine how short-video platforms present conflict reporting and how different narrative frameworks affect public understanding.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻与社交媒体研究，特别关注短视频平台在冲突报道中的角色、叙事框架分析以及新媒体环境下的新闻生产与传播。
research_direction_en: Digital journalism and social media research, particularly focusing on the role of short-video platforms in conflict reporting, narrative framework analysis, and news production and dissemination in new media environments.
